findings.title: SMBv1 requires review
findings.description: SMBv1 is enabled on the sample host.
findings.technical_details: The audit detected SMBv1 as enabled in the fictional sample state.
findings.business_impact: Legacy protocols can increase lateral movement and compatibility risk.
findings.recommendation: Disable SMBv1 after confirming no approved legacy dependency exists.

findings.title: RDP exposure requires owner validation
findings.description: RDP is listening on the sample host.
findings.technical_details: TCP 3389 was listed as open in the fictional sample output.
findings.business_impact: Unrestricted remote administration increases exposure if access is not controlled.
findings.recommendation: Confirm RDP requirement and restrict access through approved administration paths.
